## Description

Briefly describe the change and what it accomplishes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / performance

## Testing

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd backend && npm test`)
- [ ] Rule Engine tests pass (`cd rule-engine && python -m pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Manual testing done

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (ESLint, Prettier)
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
